Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for (petitioner) Yu Tong Kwong. Court appointed counsel Nancy Rasch for David Huang.

The Court stated that we are here on part of the implementation and confirmed that everyone was on board. Ms. Hinshaw stated that she has a proposed order. The Court stated that what ends up happening is that the trust for David is implemented and that the temporary is terminated. Ms. Rasch stated that the assets for this trust will go to David's trust. The Court granted the petition for order appointing successor trustee (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
